transcript: Speaker A: And from here, I goes here. Speaker B: Abey, 'I goes' nahi hota, 'I go' hota hai. [Hey, it's not 'I goes', it's 'I go'.] Speaker A: Yaar, kaash mein SpeakX Premium skip na karta. SpeakX mein grammar aur speaking lessons mil rahe the. SpeakX ka AI tutor meri sentence formation, pronunciation clarity, fluency, sab mein help karta. Apne real conversation se speaking, grammar, vocabulary, teeno improve kar deta. Aur toh aur daily conversation lessons hote. Level badhte hi new exercises practice karne milti. Aur ab tak toh grammar bhi set ho jaati. [Man, I wish I hadn't skipped SpeakX Premium. SpeakX was offering grammar and speaking lessons. SpeakX's AI tutor would have helped me with sentence formation, pronunciation clarity, and fluency. It would have improved my speaking, grammar, and vocabulary through real conversations. Plus, there were daily conversation lessons. As the level increased, I would get new exercises to practice. And by now, my grammar would have been perfect.] But it's never too late. I have started practicing English daily on SpeakX Premium. What about you? Trust me, a little practice can save a lot of embarrassment.
on_screen_text: And From Here I Goes Here Abey I Goes Nahi Hota I Go Hota Hai Yaar Kash Mein Speakx Premium Skip Na Karta Speakx Grammar Aur Speaking Lessons Mil Rahe The Speakx Ka Ai Tutor Meri Sentence Formation Pronunciation Clarity, Fluency Sab Mein Help Karta Apne Real Conversation Se Speaking Grammar Vocabulary Teeno Improve Kar Deta Aur Toh Daily Conversation Lessons Hote Level Badte He New Exercises Practice Karne Milti Aur Ab Tak Toh Grammar Bhi Set Ho Jati But It's Never Too Late I Have Started Practicing English Daily On Speakx Premium What About You? Trust Me Practice Can Save A Lot Of Embarrassment
summary: A presenter regrets making a grammatical error during a presentation and highlights how SpeakX Premium's AI tutor could have helped him. He demonstrates the app's features for improving speaking, grammar, and vocabulary. He urges viewers to practice daily on SpeakX to avoid embarrassment.
